comments: Information of tracklisting from Hal C F Astell's website.
Live: Crimson Glory, Metal Church and Anthrax from the Hammersmith Odeon 15 Feb 1987.
Date confirmed: news after the show reports on the sale of the Duchess of Windsor's jewellery by Sotheby's on 2 Apr 1987.
Tommy announces that Flotsam and Jetsam and Megadeth will be broadcast on 24 Apr 1987.

sessions.details: Metal Church and Anthrax performances from the Hammersmith Odeon. 'I Am The Law' and 'Madhouse' available on 7"-I Am The Law (Island).

track_listing.track: Crimson Glory. Recorded at Hammersmith on 15 February 1987
Metal Church. Recorded at Hammersmith on 15 February 1987
Anthrax. Recorded at Hammersmith on 15 February 1987
